overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic Arasaka corporate hallway with neon-lit digital billboards, transitioning via elevator to a luxurious high-rise penthouse apartment featuring dining area, bar, and grand piano with nighttime city views. Cyberpunk 2077 game engine footage with sleek cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate headquarters hallway with digital advertising displays

events.description: large digital billboard advertising corporate luxury wear illuminates on left wall
slowing approach toward elevator doors at end of corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a sleek corporate corridor with polished floors, passing illuminated advertisements toward the Arasaka logo screen

entered.detail: large red digital screen displaying white Arasaka corporation logo at hallway terminus
vertical digital advertisement showing woman in red dress with text 'THE NEXT LEVEL OF CORPORATE WEAR LUXURY'
modern black benches with green plants positioned along hallway walls
stainless steel elevator doors with green call button panel, appearing near end of hallway

segments.scene_description: Moving through a pristine corporate hallway with dark marble walls and red accent lighting. Digital billboards display luxury fashion advertisements on the walls while the camera approaches a large Arasaka logo screen at the corridor's end, with an elevator bank visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse living and dining area with panoramic city views

events.description: exiting elevator into dark luxury apartment with dramatic shift from corporate neon to warm ambient lighting
approaching dining table with prepared meal and drinks, slowing to examine details

agents.ego_description: moving through a spacious high-end apartment, examining the dining setup with food and drinks while panoramic windows reveal the night cityscape

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling windows revealing nighttime cityscape with distant lights
curved contemporary sofa with accent pillows in living area
long dark dining table set with plates, wine glasses, and food
bowl of food, two canned beverages, and wine glass arranged on placemats

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the corporate hallway into a luxurious, dimly lit penthouse apartment with expansive windows showing the night city. The camera explores the living space, focusing on a dining table set with a meal and drinks, before moving toward a doorway leading to another room.

scene_state.functional_zone: entertainment lounge with bar, pool table, and grand piano

events.description: passing through doorway into bar area with glitching digital screen and pool table
turning toward white grand piano positioned near the panoramic windows

agents.ego_description: exploring the entertainment wing of the apartment, passing a bar counter and pool table before approaching a white grand piano with city views

entered.detail: long sleek bar with stools and bottles arranged on counter
illuminated pool table with balls and cues in game-ready position
large digital display showing corrupted colorful static and abstract patterns
white grand piano with bench positioned near window overlooking city

segments.scene_description: Entering a sophisticated entertainment area featuring a bar counter, illuminated pool table, and a large glitching digital screen. The camera continues moving through the space, turning toward an elegant white grand piano positioned by the panoramic windows, offering a view of the nighttime cityscape while exploring the luxurious amenities.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile corporate environment into the opulent privacy of a high-rise penthouse. It begins by gliding through a pristine hallway of dark marble and red accent lighting, passing digital fashion billboards as it approaches a large Arasaka logo and an elevator bank. As the camera transitions from the corridor, the scene opens into a dimly lit living space where expansive windows reveal the night city and a dining table is set with a meal. The movement then flows through a doorway into a sophisticated entertainment area featuring a bar, an illuminated pool table, and a glitching digital screen. Finally, the camera turns toward an elegant white grand piano positioned against panoramic windows, overlooking the sprawling nighttime cityscape.
